title: The Rescue Race Starts
description: The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.
scene: Across pages 17, 19, 20, this part follows Marine Soldier, Rob Lucci, Luffy, Zoro, Nami. The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.

dialogue.speaker: Marine Soldier
dialogue.text: Here we go!! USOPP gallery Pirates!!!

summary: The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.
